title: Shortfy
description: A production-grade URL shortening and link analytics platform engineered for high performance. Built with a Django REST Framework backend and a modern Next.js frontend to ensure optimal Server-Side Rendering (SSR) and SEO efficiency. Features ultra-fast link redirection, robust tracking capabilities, and an intuitive dashboard.

title: Online Banking
description: A secure web banking simulation designed around Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) paradigms in Python. Powered by the Django framework, it manages complex financial logic including deposit systems, transfer validation, transaction ledger creation, and account balance auditing with an interactive Tailwind CSS interface.

title: Disease Prediction Site
description: An innovative digital healthcare platform integrating machine learning with web technologies. Built on a Django backend, it utilizes NumPy and Pandas to analyze user-inputted symptoms and predict potential health conditions. Features a responsive Tailwind CSS dashboard and an integrated communication portal for patient-doctor interactions.

title: CMS diagnostic Center
description: A professional management system designed for medical diagnostic facilities. Architected with a Django REST Framework (DRF) backend and a highly responsive React.js frontend. Automates essential healthcare workflows such as test catalog browsing, appointment scheduling, and patient report accessibility.

title: Ema-john Shop
description: A modern, high-performance single-page application (SPA) replicating an e-commerce ecosystem. Built using React.js and styled with Tailwind CSS, it leverages Firebase for secure, real-time user authentication and robust hosting. Features synchronous cart states, product discovery interfaces, and an optimized user journey.

title: Ecommerce Project
description: A robust full-stack e-commerce solution engineered with a decoupled architecture. Features an API-driven Django backend paired with a high-performance React and Redux state management frontend. Implements secure token-based authentication (JWT), dynamic product routing, a scalable shopping cart system, and an interactive UI powered by Material Tailwind.

title: Best Online Shopping Platform
description: A seamless monolithic e-commerce application powered by Django. Designed with an intuitive and responsive server-side rendered (SSR) frontend using Tailwind CSS and JavaScript. Includes features like product listing, category-based filtering, user session management, and a streamlined checkout flow.

title: Blood Donation Social Project
description: A community-focused web application designed to streamline blood donation workflows and bridge the gap between donors and recipients. Built with Django and modern frontend tools, the platform features user role management, real-time requests, location-based searching, and status tracking for urgent blood requirements.
